name: RITESH DILIPRAO BHAKARE
project_description: Small farmers rely on guesswork and fragmented advice for key decisions like fertilizer, spraying, and irrigation, leading to losses. AgriBotics provides clear, location-based guidance on what to do and when, helping farmers make confident decisions, reduce risk, and improve productivity.
building: Small farmers rely on guesswork and fragmented advice for key decisions like fertilizer, spraying, and irrigation, leading to losses. AgriBotics provides clear, location-based guidance on what to do and when, helping farmers make confident decisions, reduce risk, and improve productivity.
impressive: Built AgriBotics, a working agri-tech platform with real farmer validation. Engaged 500+ farmers via WhatsApp, conducted village demos, and reached NitiQuest finals with Best Agri-Tech award. Secured early investor interest, showing strong execution and real-world impact beyond idea stage.
why_epoch: Epoch offers mentorship, network, and real validation. We want to refine product-market fit, strengthen execution, and learn from experienced founders to build AgriBotics into scalable and impactful.
team_members:
krish Gupta- tech operations Lead
Muzammil shikh- marketing operations Lead
Riya Diwakar- Research lead

name: Maaz
project_description: I am building an intelligent “Life OS” — a unified app to control and manage your entire digital life through one interface. Currently a web app due to hardware limits, with the goal of launching as a mobile and cross-platform system powered by context-aware AI.
building: I am building an intelligent “Life OS” — a unified app to control and manage your entire digital life through one interface. Currently a web app due to hardware limits, with the goal of launching as a mobile and cross-platform system powered by context-aware AI.
impressive:
Built FlickAI, an intelligent desktop AI assistant that sees screen context and helps in real time—debugging code, writing emails, summarizing, and more without switching tabs. Built in 24h at a global hackathon; won ₹227,500 ($2.5k).
https://x.com/Maaztwts/status/2016358730548527445
why_epoch: I can attend remotely from Delhi. I want to build my Life OS app into a fully working product, and Epoch offers the right ecosystem, feedback, and potential grant/credits to accelerate development!

name: Vivek Singh
project_description: Noesis Systems turns fragmented external signals into a live intelligence graph of an organization’s attack surface, uncovering hidden assets and simulating adversary paths to expose the highest-probability breaches in real time.
building: Noesis Systems turns fragmented external signals into a live intelligence graph of an organization’s attack surface, uncovering hidden assets and simulating adversary paths to expose the highest-probability breaches in real time.
impressive: The most impressive thing I've built or done would be solo starting my first cybersecurity hardware startup while be full time student, i single handedly designed, coded and sold around 500+ devices.
why_epoch: I wanna network with more great folks, i wanna get my first revenue and achieve what I truly desire, and EPOCH is the best place to get everything, and I wanna utilise as much as possible.

name: Arihan Iyer
project_description: We are solving for a market where young creators with great story ideas want to create their own short film or short story reels for social media apps like YouTube/Instagram but don’t have much knowledge about video creation and edits or voiceovers. We bridge this gap by creating an AI-powered tool.
building: We are solving for a market where young creators with great story ideas want to create their own short film or short story reels for social media apps like YouTube/Instagram but don’t have much knowledge about video creation and edits or voiceovers. We bridge this gap by creating an AI-powered tool.
impressive:

name: Ankush Deshmukh
github_url: I am a Cloud Architect with 14 years of experience building scalable infrastructure for Fortune 500 companies. Beyond the terminal, I bring 10 years of expertise as a professional fitness trainer. I bridge the gap between complex engineering and human performance, leveraging my technical rigor to build the next generation of data-driven wellness solutions.
project_description: ZRONE is an AI-driven ecosystem that integrates with wearables to eliminate "recovery-blindness." Using a proprietary Dynamic Zone engine, it recalibrates workout intensity in real-time based on daily biometric data. Designed for enthusiasts and families.
best_link: I am a Cloud Architect with 14 years of experience building scalable infrastructure for Fortune 500 companies. Beyond the terminal, I bring 10 years of expertise as a professional fitness trainer. I bridge the gap between complex engineering and human performance, leveraging my technical rigor to build the next generation of data-driven wellness solutions.
building: ZRONE is an AI-driven ecosystem that integrates with wearables to eliminate "recovery-blindness." Using a proprietary Dynamic Zone engine, it recalibrates workout intensity in real-time based on daily biometric data. Designed for enthusiasts and families.
impressive: I developed ZRONE, an AI-powered fitness ecosystem that integrates with wearables and uses a proprietary Dynamic Zone engine to transform real-time biometric data into enterprise-grade, recovery-based training programs.
why_epoch: I am seeking expert mentorship for idea validation, a high-level network within the HealthTech and Wearable IoT sectors, and a structured Go-To-Market strategy to scale ZRONE’s enterprise-grade arch.
